mxCell.value:
Functional Requirement

1.User able to login or register itself

2.user able to see  search the product

3.user able to see the description of product

4.user able to checkout the service

5.user able to increase or decrease the quantity and add to  cart

Non Functional Requirement

1.According to CAP theorum 

we give higher priorty to Availablity>>>>Consistency in case of searching and view product

we give higher proirty to consistency than Availability in case of payment 

2 Latency-200ms

Core Entites

1 User

2.Cart

3.Product

4 orders

5.checkout Service

Scale
100M dailty Active user 
2.in every second 10 product search and sold
we have the feed to be search
keep on looking the DB changes
